race.comment: WITCH OF NOVEMBER (7) returns after a spell of four-and-a-half months. Started the last campaign in good style when in the placings over 1000m at Canberra. Rates highly and makes plenty of appeal. KGALAGADI (3) saluted at Deniliquin two runs ago. Not disgraced last time out when second over 1050m at Leeton, beaten a nose. Meeting a deeper field this time but he has the ability to bounce back. PATTERA (5) wasn't far away first-up and deserves following. WILD ANNIE (8) last appeared three months ago when she finished 4 lengths from the winner in sixth over 1175m at Albury. Has claims fresh. O'REG (6) hasn't set the world on fire of late but is a possible improver.
